L1_headline: + PEN – Harpreet Grewal acquired 589 RSU shares. | 02/13/2026
L2_brief: Director Harpreet Grewal acquired 589 shares of Penumbra Inc common stock on 02/13/2026 at $0 per share via a restricted stock unit (RSU) grant. The RSUs vest quarterly through 12/31/2026 but will fully accelerate upon the closing of Penumbra's pending merger with Boston Scientific Corporation. Post-transaction holdings are 8,819 shares (direct), a portion of which remain subject to vesting.

L3_detailed.deal_signal: Penumbra Inc is subject to a pending Agreement and Plan of Merger dated 01/14/2026 with Boston Scientific Corporation and Pinehurst Merger Sub, Inc. Per the filing, the RSUs contain a merger acceleration provision: any unvested RSUs will fully vest upon the Closing of the merger, subject to continued service as director through that date. This is a standard equity acceleration clause in the merger agreement; no discretionary trading activity is present in this filing.
L3_detailed.pattern_notes: This is a routine annual/periodic RSU grant to a director with quarterly vesting (1/4 on each of 03/31/2026, 06/30/2026, 09/30/2026, and 12/31/2026). No open-market purchases or sales were reported. The grant represents approximately 6.7% of post-transaction holdings.
risks_flagged: No 10b5-1 plan noted; transaction is an RSU grant, not an open-market trade
Merger acceleration clause: unvested RSUs fully vest upon closing of Boston Scientific merger
A portion of total holdings (8,819 shares) remains subject to vesting conditions
